nasb.text: so that they might request compassion from the God of heaven concerning this mystery, so that Daniel and his friends would not be destroyed with the rest of the wise men of Babylon.

esv.text: and told them to seek mercy from the God of heaven concerning this mystery, so that Daniel and his companions might not be destroyed with the rest of the wise men of Babylon.

cnv.text: 要他們為這隱祕的事祈求天上的　神憐憫，免得但以理和他的同伴與巴比倫其餘的智慧人一同滅亡。

ccb.text: 要同伴祈求天上的上帝施怜悯，显明这奥秘，以免他们和其他巴比伦的智者一起被杀。
